notes: Poki MVP art budget. Shipping garments use only locked worn-on-body generation plus body_peel and visual QA; legacy placed art is excluded.

assets.description: Locked fixed-pose doll accepted by target-player beauty test
One dress and one top per Essence; sets primary recipe input
Two accents per Essence; sets secondary recipe input
Three composable static layers per recipe: back silhouette, upper accent and foreground flourish
Reusable glyphs, auras, burst masks and tiny particles
Backstage dress room and bright magical runway
Two opponent silhouette/card compositions and one reusable crowd silhouette layer
Minimal skin/face or makeup variants proven compatible with the locked doll contract
Minimal 9-slice panels, button states, category icons and recipe silhouettes
One runway loop plus eleven layered UI/reveal/victory cues
